overall.description: A first-person walkthrough of a rain-slicked cyberpunk city street at night, featuring dense neon signage, towering buildings with illuminated balconies, and atmospheric steam vents. The footage appears to be from Cyberpunk 2077, showcasing the game's distinctive visual style with vibrant pink and cyan neon reflections on wet concrete.

events.description: camera passes a seated figure sitting on the ground near green bollards

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a rain-slicked cyberpunk plaza at night, dominated by the bright cyan 'SOFTSYS' neon sign. The camera moves forward past concrete bollards and a seated figure on the ground, approaching an intersection with tall digital billboards visible in the distance.

camera begins tilting back down to street level

entered.detail: tall multi-story building with prominent pink neon strip lighting on each balcony level
human silhouettes visible standing on the illuminated balconies
illuminated vertical signs with arrow motifs mounted on the building corner

segments.scene_description: The camera tilts upward to reveal a towering building with striking pink neon balcony lighting against the night sky. Silhouetted figures stand on the upper levels as the camera pans across the facade before beginning to descend back to street level.

scene_state.functional_zone: commercial intersection transitioning to narrow alley

events.description: approaching and entering a narrower street section with visible steam rising from vents

agents.ego_description: walking past the Jacked and Coke establishment and continuing toward a narrower street section with steam vents

notable_agents.action: person in orange outfit walking across the plaza area

entered.detail: opening to a narrower alleyway with dense neon signage and atmospheric steam
ground-level vents emitting white steam or smoke across the street

segments.scene_description: Back at street level, the camera moves past the prominent Jacked and Coke neon sign and continues through an open plaza. The environment transitions toward a narrower street ahead where steam rises from ground vents, creating an atmospheric alleyway entrance.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow neon-lit alley with steam and illuminated shop windows

events.description: entering the steam-filled narrow street with dense pink and cyan neon lighting
passing by illuminated shop windows displaying mannequins with pink backlighting

agents.ego_description: walking through a narrow atmospheric alley filled with steam and vibrant neon reflections, observing the illuminated storefronts

notable_agents.action: person standing near a doorway observing the street activity

entered.detail: storefront windows with bright pink neon framing and illuminated mannequins inside
horizontal cyan neon light tubes mounted along the building overhang
multiple layered digital screens and neon signs lining the narrow alley walls

segments.scene_description: The final segment moves through a narrow, atmospheric alley dense with rising steam and vibrant neon lighting. Pink illuminated shop windows display mannequins on the right while cyan neon tubes line the left wall, creating a classic cyberpunk street scene with reflective wet pavement.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a rain-slicked cyberpunk plaza that gradually narrows into a dense, steam-filled alleyway. It begins by gliding past concrete bollards and a seated figure under the glow of a bright cyan SOFTSYS sign, moving toward a distant intersection of digital billboards. As the camera tilts upward, the view shifts to a towering building with pink neon balconies and silhouetted figures before descending back to the wet pavement. The scene then opens across a plaza past a Jacked and Coke sign, transitioning from the wide-open square toward a tighter street where steam begins to rise from ground vents. Finally, the camera pushes into a narrow alleyway, moving between pink-lit shop windows with mannequins and cyan neon tubes that reflect off the shimmering, rain-soaked ground.
